phase_target: Phase 1.0-fix (Wave 0 / Group B-1 critical-missing endpoint implementation)

summary.notes: Group B-1 は 94 critical-missing endpoint を 3 wave (W1: auth+foundation 13 件 / W2: workspace-scoped CRUD 40 件 / W3: cross-cutting 41 件) で並列実装する。全 task は backend カテゴリの NEW 実装で、Foundation OpenAPI contract (openapi.yaml) との 1:1 整合を Schemathesis で gate する。Wave 1 の F-001 auth エンドポイント完成が他 Wave の前提条件 (token-issuing endpoint 無しでは他 API テストが authenticate できない)。

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/auth/login endpoint (F-001 / T-V3-DRIFT-F-001-01)
tasks.label: NEW

structural: UBIQUITOUS: The system shall expose a FastAPI route at `POST /api/auth/login` registered via APIRouter in `backend/routers/auth.py` and included in `backend/app/main.py`.
UBIQUITOUS: The route handler `post_auth_login` shall conform to the OpenAPI v3 spec at `docs/api-design/2026-05-16_v3/openapi.yaml` (operationId, request schema, response schema, status codes 1:1).

EVENT-DRIVEN: When `pytest backend/tests/contract/test_openapi_contract.py::test_t_v3_b1_001` is executed via Schemathesis, the system shall pass the contract test with 0 drift against the OpenAPI document.
functional: EVENT-DRIVEN: When a `public` caller sends a syntactically valid `POST /api/auth/login` request, the system shall return HTTP 201 with a response body matching the OpenAPI schema for that operation.
UNWANTED: If invalid credentials (generic, no user enumeration), the system shall return 401.
UNWANTED: If account locked, the system shall return 403.
UNWANTED: If email format invalid or password too short, the system shall return 422.
EVENT-DRIVEN: When rate limit exceeded (5 failed attempts in 15 min), the system shall return 429 (rate limited).
UNWANTED: If internal server error, the system shall return 500.

STATE-DRIVEN: While the caller is authenticated as `public`, the system shall enforce row-level access via Supabase RLS policies: accounts:accounts_service_role_all, workspace_members:workspace_members_service_role_all, workspace_members:workspace_members_workspace_member_select, workspace_members:workspace_members_workspace_member_write.
OPTIONAL: Where rate limit `5/min/ip` is configured, the system shall return 429 when the caller exceeds the per-window quota.
regression: The system shall pass `pytest backend/tests/integration/test_auth_endpoints.py -v -k T-V3-B1-001` with 0 failures and coverage >= 70% on the touched router and service modules.
The system shall pass `pyright --strict backend/routers/ backend/services/` with 0 errors on edited files.
The system shall pass `ruff check backend/routers/ backend/services/ backend/tests/` with 0 violations on edited files.
The system shall pass `python3 scripts/validate-tickets.py --check-file docs/task-decomposition/2026-05-16_v3_phase1/tickets-group-b1-api-missing.json` for entry T-V3-B1-001.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/lint-mock.sh` with 17/17 rules OK.
The system shall pass `bash scripts/audit-md-check.sh T-V3-B1-001`.

unauthenticated_endpoint: must enforce strict rate-limit and input validation
